title: Device Forensics: F5 BIG-IP — Live CLI
description: bigip-01 was hit via the TMUI path-traversal-to-RCE family (CVE-2020-5902 lineage). Connect to the device, run TMSH commands — `list /auth user`, `list /ltm rule`, `show httpd-log` — and reconstruct the attacker's persistence + data-exfil path.

hints.text: `connect bigip-01`. Start with `list /auth user` and compare against expected admin / noc-readonly. Anyone else is suspect.
`list /ltm rule` — TCL source for every iRule. The exfil one uses `catch { exec /bin/logger -n ... }`.
`show httpd-log | include REDACTED` — initial RCE path traversal is the clearest tell.
